Component.Name: DropShipEdit
Component.Caption: C(DropShipStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForBlanketBillTo(, , ShipToName, , , , , , , , , , , , , ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: DropShipGridCol
Component.Caption: sDropShip
Component.DefaultFrom: CustNumForBlanketBillTo(, , ShipToName, , , , , , , , , , , , , ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: DropShipSeqEdit
Component.Caption: C(DropShipSeqStatic)
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqDropShipToAllow0(CustNum, AdrName, , , , , , , , , ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToName, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: DropShipSeqGridCol
Component.DefaultFrom: CustSeqDropShipToAllow0(CustNum, AdrName, , , , , , , , , ShipToAddr_1, ShipToAddr_2, ShipToAddr_3, ShipToAddr_4, ShipToCity, ShipToCountry, ShipToName, ShipToState, ShipToZip)

Component.Name: ReasonCode
Component.Caption: sReasonCode
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPriceDiscreReason( PROPERTIES(reason_code,description) DISPLAY(1,2)FILTER(reason_class='PRICE DISCRE' and site_ref=ISNULL(FC(ShipSiteEdit),FV(Parm_Site)))ORDERBY(reason_code)RECORDCAP(0))

Component.Name: ReasonCodeGridCol
Component.Caption: sReasonCode
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPriceDiscreReason( PROPERTIES(reason_code,description) DISPLAY(1,2)FILTER(reason_class='PRICE DISCRE' and site_ref=ISNULL(FC(ShipSiteEdit),FV(Parm_Site)))ORDERBY(reason_code))

Component.Name: ReleaseNumEdit
Component.Caption: C(ReleaseNumStatic)
Component.DefaultData: AUTONUMBER( FILTER( CoNum = FP(CoNum) And CoLine = FP(CoLine)))
Component.Post301DataType: DEFAULTVALUE(AUTONUMBER( FILTER( CoNum = FP(CoNum) And CoLine = FP(CoLine))))

Component.Name: ReleaseNumGridCol
Component.DefaultData: AUTONUMBER( FILTER( CoNum = FP(CoNum) And CoLine = FP(CoLine)))
Component.Post301DataType: DEFAULTVALUE(AUTONUMBER( FILTER( CoNum = FP(CoNum) And CoLine = FP(CoLine))))

ActiveXComponentProperty.Properties: <chart paletteColors="368ac0,efa836,76b051" showShadow="0" use3DLighting="0" showBorder="0" bgAlpha="0" plotFillAngle="0" plotFillRatio="100" plotFillAlpha="98" plotGradientColor="666666" plotFillColor="0" baseFont="Arial" />

EventHandler.Name: AddTrnLoc
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItemLocs.ItemLocAddRemoteSp( PARMS(VAR V(LocWhse), VAR P(Item), VAR V(TrnLoc), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR V(TrnLocQuestionAsked), VAR V(LocSite), RVAR V(RowPointer), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CallGetCoItemDetailForBlanketSp
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetStandardPriceMethod( PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit), RVAR P(AU_contract_price_method), RVAR P(standard_price), RVAR V(infobar)) )

EventHandler.Name: CalPriceOnDueDate
EventHandler.Response: SLCoBlns.AU_CalculateCoLineReleasePriceSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(CblBlanketQtyConv), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(PriceConv), MESSAGE, VAR P(CoLine), VAR, VAR) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: CheckCoStatus
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.CheckCoStatusSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoType), VAR V(CoNumList), RVAR V(CoNumAndStatList), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ChkXRef
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.ChkXrefWarningSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), RVAR V(WarningMsg)) )

EventHandler.Name: CoLineChanged
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_CoLineChanged_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() 'ThisForm.Components("CoReleaseEdit").DefaultData 'ThisForm.Components("CoReleaseGridCol").DefaultData End Sub
End Class End Namespace )

EventHandler.Name: CreateTransferOrder
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CitemXSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(Whse), RVAR V(RefLineSuf), RVAR V(XrefDestination), RVAR V(CreateFlag), RVAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: DataChangeCommCode
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCommodities.GetSupplQtyConvFactorSp( PARMS(VAR P(CommCode), RVAR V(vSupplQtyFactor), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: DropShipChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CoitemDropShipChangedSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Item), VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR P(CoTaxCode1), VAR P(CoTaxCode2), VAR P(TaxCode1), VAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(DerDropShipToAddr), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR V(TaxCode1), RVAR V(TaxCode2), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons)) )

EventHandler.Name: DropShipChanged
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTaxcodes.TaxDescSp( PARMS(VAR item, VAR P(TaxCode1), VAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(Tc2Description)) )

EventHandler.Name: FRGetDefaultItemOrigin
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.FRGetOrigin( PARMS(VAR P(Item), RVAR P(Origin), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: FRGetDefaultItemTaxCodes
EventHandler.Response: SLItemcusts.DefaultItemTaxCodesByCustomerItem( PARMS(VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(TaxCode2), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: FRGetDefaultItemTaxCodes
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTaxcodes.TaxDescSp( PARMS(VAR item, VAR P(TaxCode1), VAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(Tc2Description)) )

EventHandler.Name: GenerateRefNum
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.GenerateRefNumSp( PARMS(VAR P(RefType), RVAR P(RefNum), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GetCoitemDetails
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetStandardPriceMethod( PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR C(CoLineEdit), RVAR P(AU_contract_price_method), RVAR P(standard_price), RVAR V(infobar)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetDIFOTPolicy
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetDIFOTPolicySp( PARMS(VAR, VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(CustNum), VAR P(CustSeq), VAR 6, RVAR P(ShippedOverOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(ShippedUnderOrderedQtyTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedAfterDueDateTolerance), RVAR P(DaysShippedBeforeDueDateTolerance)) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNextJob
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLJobs.NextWoSp( PARMS(BSTR PuppiesAreCute, BSTR C(ReferenceNumEdit), VAR 10, RVAR C(ReferenceNumEdit), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNextPo
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPos.NextPoSp( PARMS(BSTR PuppiesAreCute, BSTR C(ReferenceNumEdit), VAR 10, RVAR C(ReferenceNumEdit), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNextPreq
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLPreqs.NextPreqSp( PARMS(BSTR PuppiesAreCute, BSTR C(ReferenceNumEdit), VAR 10, RVAR C(ReferenceNumEdit), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNextPrj
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLProjs.NextPrjSp( PARMS(BSTR PuppiesAreCute, BSTR C(ReferenceNumEdit), VAR 10, RVAR C(ReferenceNumEdit), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNextTrn
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLTransfers.NextTrnSp( PARMS(BSTR PuppiesAreCute, BSTR C(ReferenceNumEdit), VAR 10, RVAR C(ReferenceNumEdit), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: GetNextValidDueDate
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.GetNextValidDueDateSp( PARMS(VAR C, VAR 1, VAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(DueDate), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: GetVATCodeForCustomerOrder
EventHandler.Response: SLPLDefaultCoitemTaxCodes.PLGetVATCodeForCustomerOrder( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(Item), VAR COI, VAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR P(TaxCode1), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ItemValidateInventory
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLItems.ObsSlowSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 0, VAR 1, MESSAGE, RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPrompt), RVAR V(ItemObsSlowPromptButtons), VAR P(ShipSite)) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: LaunchFormItemContentReferences
EventHandler.Response: ItemContentReferences( SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh, ItemVar=P(Item), EffectDateVar=P(CoOrderDate), RefTypeVar=O, RefNumVar=P(CoNum), RefLineSufVar=P(CoLine), RefReleaseVar=P(CoRelease)) LINKBY(CoNum=RefNum,Item=Item,CoOrderDate=EffectDate,CoLine=RefLineSuf,CoRelease=RefRelease,DerRefType=RefType) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(ItemVar=P(Item), EffectDateVar=P(CoOrderDate), RefTypeVar=O, RefNumVar=P(CoNum), RefLineSufVar=P(CoLine), RefReleaseVar=P(CoRelease)) )

EventHandler.Name: ListEstimatedCharges
EventHandler.Response: EstimatedTotalCharges( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(PTable=co_all, PSite=V(Parm_Site), PCoNum=P(CoNum), PCalcTax=1) )

EventHandler.Name: LoadDropShipAddy
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLInteractions.FormatAddressSp( PARMS(VAR C(DropShipEdit), VAR C(DropShipSeqEdit), RVAR V(PuppiesAreCute), RVAR C(DropShipAddy), MESSAGE) )

EventHandler.Name: msgCanSetCoStatus
EventHandler.Response: MsgApp(Clear, Prompt, ReturnAction, mQ=IsCompareWillSet1NoYes, STRINGS(sStatus), @sCoStatus=V(CoStat), @sCoStatus=C,STRINGS(sCustomerOrder), STRINGS(sCoNum), VV(CoNum))

EventHandler.Name: PromptForWhse
EventHandler.Response: PromptForWarehouseData( OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(TrnNum=P(RefNum), ToWhse=P(Whse), ToSite=V(ParmSite), FromSite=V(FromSite), CalledFrom=V(FormName), FromWhse=V(FromWhse), Item=P(Item)) )

EventHandler.Name: RunBlanketLineMaintenance
EventHandler.Response: CustomerOrderBlanketLines( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoStat=P(Stat), CurrCode=P(AdrCurrCode), CoPricecode=P(Pricecode), CoOrigSite=P(ShipSite), CoExchRate=P(CoExchRate), CadrName=P(Adr0Name), CoCustNum=P(CoCustNum), CoOrderDate=P(CoOrderDate), CoEffDate=P(CblExpDate), CoExpDate=P(CblEffDate), CurrCstPrcFormat=P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), PcoDescription=P(PricecodeDesc)) )

EventHandler.Name: RunCTP
EventHandler.Response: CTPResults( SETVARVALUES(CTPCalledFrom=BlanketReleases, V_CoLine=P(CoLine), V_CoNum=P(CoNum), V_CoRelease=P(CoRelease), V_Item=P(Item), V_QtyOrdered=P(CblBlanketQtyConv), V_QtyReleased=P(QtyOrderedConv)) )

EventHandler.Name: SetDueDateDefault
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CoDuePerSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR V(ICDuePeriod), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(Whse)) )

EventHandler.Name: ShowCTPResults
EventHandler.Response: CTPResults( SETVARVALUES(CTPCalledFrom=BlanketReleases, V_CoLine=P(CoLine), V_CoNum=P(CoNum), V_CoRelease=P(CoRelease), V_Item=P(Item), V_QtyOrdered=P(CblBlanketQtyConv), V_QtyReleased=P(QtyOrderedConv)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormCalledFormReturned
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public class EvHandler_StdFormCalledFormReturned_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() 'SSSFS Start { If ThisForm.LastModalChildName = "ServiceOrderQuickCreate" And ThisForm.LastModalChildEndedOk Then ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.RefreshCurrentObject End If 'SSSFS Finish } End Sub End Class End Nam

EventHandler.Name: StdFormCopyCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SL.SlCoItems.ReadyQtyCalcsp( PARMS(VAR RefType, VAR Item, VAR OldWhse, VAR ShipSite, RVAR P(QtyReady)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormNew2
EventHandler.Response: SETVARVALUES(CoLine=P(CoLine), Item=P(Item), Description=P(Description), CustItem=P(CustItem), CblBlanketQtyConv=P(CblBlanketQtyConv), UM=P(UM), CblContPriceConv=P(CblContPriceConv), CblEffDate=P(CblEffDate), CblExpDate=P(CblExpDate))

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoItems.BlanketReleasesGetParmsSp( PARMS(VAR APS - Override Projected Date, VAR APS - Set DueDate LT Projected, RVAR V(CanDueNEProjected), RVAR V(CanDueLTProjected), RVAR V(Parm_DuePeriod), RVAR V(ApsParmApsmode), RVAR V(Parm_EcReporting)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormPredisplay
EventHandler.Response: SLFormAdoption.LoadBannerStatus( PARMS(VAR V(CurrentFormName), RVAR V(DisableBanner), RVAR V(EndOfSupport), RVAR V(NewFormName), RVAR V(ToastStatus)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdFormSaveCompleted
EventHandler.Response: MGCore.DefineVariables.GetVariableSp( PARMS(VAR SumCoSpMaxCoDisc, VAR , VAR 1, RVAR V(CoNumList), MESSAGE) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectNewCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CoDuePerSp( PARMS(VAR P(Item), VAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR V(ICDuePeriod), VAR P(CustItem), VAR P(Whse)) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR BlanketReleases, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

EventHandler.Name: TranslateCurrency
EventHandler.Response: BlanketReleasesDomesticCurrency( LINKBY(CoNum=CoNum,CoLine=CoLine,CoRelease=CoRelease) SETVARVALUESONLINKUPDATE(CoNum = P(CoNum), CoLine=P(CoLine), CoRelease=P(CoRelease), AdrName=P(Adr0Name), Item = P(Item), Description=P(Description), AdrCurrCode = P(AdrCurrCode), Stat=P(Stat), PriceConv = P(PriceConv), DerNetPrice = P(CblContPriceConv), DerExtPrice = P(DerExtPrice), TRate=P(CoExchRate)) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateDueDate
EventHandler.Response: SLCoitems.ValidateDueDateSp( PARMS(VAR C, VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(ShipSite), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ValidateQty
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoItems.CoReleaseValidQtyOrderedSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CoCustNum), VAR P(AdrCurrCode), VAR P(Pricecode), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR, VAR P(ShipSite), VAR P(CoOrderDate), VAR P(Whse), VAR P(RefType), RVAR, RVAR P(QtyReady), RVAR P(DerQtyReadyConv), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: WarehouseChanged
EventHandler.Response: SLCos.ValidateCOConsignValuesSp( PARMS(VAR, VAR, VAR P(Whse), VAR, VAR P(CoNum), RVAR V(ConsignableOrder), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: XRef
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CitemXSp( PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease),VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(UM), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR P(Whse), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR V(XrefDestination), RVAR V(CreateFlag), RVAR V(CreateFlag2),RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackendMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: XrefCreate
EventHandler.Response:
SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On Option Strict On
Imports System Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol Imports Mongoose.Scripting
Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts Public Class EvHandler_XrefCreate_0 Inherits GlobalScript
Sub Main() If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.GetCurrentObjectProperty("RefType") = "S" Then ThisForm.GenerateEvent("SSSFSSROXrefCreate") End If ReturnValue = "0" End Sub End Class End Namesp

EventHandler.Name: XrefCreate
EventHandler.Response: SL.SLCoitems.CitemXPreSp( PARMS(VAR V(SourceFile), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(DueDate), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR V(FromSite), RVAR V(ParmSite), RVAR V(PoChangeOrd), RVAR V(PromptMsg1), RVAR V(PromptButtons1), RVAR V(PromptMsg2), RVAR V(PromptButtons2), RVAR V(PromptMsg3), RVAR V(PromptButtons3), RVAR V(PromptMsg4), RVAR V(PromptButtons4), RVAR V(PromptMsg5), RVAR V(PromptButtons5), MESSAGE, RVAR V(FromWhse), VAR P(DerLinePlant)) )

Variable.Name: cds_DataGraph
Variable.Value: chart.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(QtyOrderedConv, DerQtyReadyConv, DerQtyShippedConv) LEGENDS(sQtyOrdered, sQtyReady, sQtyShipped) RENDERASLIST(, , ) CHARTSTYLE(Multi-Series Charts) CHARTTYPE(MSColumn2D) CHARTBINDTOCURRENTROW(1))

Variable.Name: cds_graph2
Variable.Value: graph.object( DATASERIESPROPERTIES(QtyOrderedConv, DerQtyReadyConv, DerQtyShippedConv) DATASERIESCOLORS(255,0,0|0,0,255|0,64,0) LEGENDS(sQtyOrdered, sQtyReady, sQtyShipped) DEFAULTTYPE(80) DEFAULTXLIMIT(1) LEGENDPOS(1) XAXISTITLEPOSITION(0) YAXISTITLEPOSITION(0) YAXISTITLEORIENTATION(0) YMIN(0) YMAX(0) WIDGETVERTICAL(False) LAYOUTTYPE(10) LEGENDBORDERBOX(False) LEGENDHORIZONTAL(False) GRAPHBORDERBOX(False) NOXAXISLABEL(False) LEGENDAUTOTEXTCOLOR(True) LEGENDBOXMODE(1) LEGENDTEXTHALIGN(2) LEGENDT
Variable.Value2: EXTVALIGN(1) LOCKOBJ(True) RUNTIMEBUTTONS(True) RUNTIMEPROPERTIES(False) MARKERMOUSEOVER(False) LAYOUTGRIDWIDTH(100) LAYOUTGRIDHEIGHT(68) LAYOUTGRIDX(5) LAYOUTGRIDY(0) LAYOUTGRIDANCHOR(0) LAYOUTTITLEWIDTH(0) LAYOUTTITLEHEIGHT(0) LAYOUTTITLEX(0) LAYOUTTITLEY(0) LAYOUTTITLEANCHOR(0) LAYOUTLEGENDWIDTH(100) LAYOUTLEGENDHEIGHT(25) LAYOUTLEGENDX(5) LAYOUTLEGENDY(70) LAYOUTLEGENDANCHOR(0) LAYOUTGRIDTOPMARGIN(5) LAYOUTGRIDBOTTOMMARGIN(5) LAYOUTGRIDLEFTMARGIN(35) LAYOUTGRIDRIGHTMARGIN(5) LAYOUTLEGENDTOPM

Variable.Name: ehm1_CallCustOrderLinesFormDefaultsSp0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR, RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR P(CoOrigSite), RVAR, RVAR P(CoConsolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR, RVAR P(Co

Variable.Name: ehm1_CallGetCoItemDetailForBlanketSp0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), RVAR V(CoCustNum), RVAR P(Adr0Name), RVAR P(CoOrderDate), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(CblBlanketQtyConv), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(CblContPriceConv), RVAR P(CblEffDate), RVAR P(CblExpDate), RVAR P(AdrCreditHold), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Orig

Variable.Name: ehm1_CreateTransferOrder3
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Description), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CoStat), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR V(ToWhse), VAR V(FromWhse), VAR V(FromSite), VAR V(ToSite), VAR V(PoChangeOrd), VAR V(MpwxrefDelete), VAR V(CreateFlag), VAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease), VAR V(TrnLoc), VAR V(FOBSite), RVAR V(TrnLocQuestionAsked), RVAR V(PromptMsg),

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetCoitemDetails1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(TransNat2Description), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(CoConsolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR, RVAR,
Variable.Value2: RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(CurrencyAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor), RVAR V(CoStat), MESSAGE, RVAR P(CusTaxRegNum1ExpDate), RVAR P(CouEcCode), RVAR P(CusTaxCode1Type),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_GetCoitemDetails2
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), RVAR V(CoCustNum), RVAR P(Adr0Name), RVAR P(CoOrderDate), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(CblBlanketQtyConv), RVAR P(CblUM), RVAR P(CblContPriceConv), RVAR P(CblEffDate), RVAR P(CblExpDate), RVAR P(AdrCreditHold), RVAR P(CoRelease), RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(TransNat), VAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCod

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdFormNewCompleted0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR CoNum, VAR CoLine, RVAR RCoitemShipSite, RVAR RCoitemStat, RVAR RCoitemItem, RVAR RCoitemUM, RVAR RCoitemQtyOrderedConv, RVAR RCoitemDueDate, RVAR RCoitemPrice, RVAR RCoitemPriceConv, RVAR RCoitemCustItem, RVAR RCoitemTransNat, RVAR RCoitemTrnDesc, RVAR RCoitemDelterm, RVAR RCoitemDeltermDesc, RVAR RCoitemProcessInd, RVAR RCoitemEcCode, RVAR RCoitemOrigin, RVAR RCoitemCommCode, RVAR RCoitemSupplQty, RVAR RCoitemExportValue, RVAR RCoitemCustNum, RVAR RCoitemCustSeq, RVAR RCoitemWhse, RV
Variable.Value2: AR RCoitemPricecode, RVAR RCoitemCoOrigSite, RVAR RCoitemReprice, RVAR RCoitemConsolidate, RVAR RCoitemSummarize, RVAR RCoitemInvFreq, RVAR RCoitemFeatStr, RVAR RCoitemReleaseDate, RVAR RCoitemRefType, RVAR RCoitemTaxCode1,)

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdFormNewCompleted1
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR P(CoLine), RVAR C(ShipSiteEdit), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Stat), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Item), RVAR P(SLCoitems.UM), RVAR C(QtyOrderedEdit), RVAR C(DueDateEdit), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Price), RVAR P(SLCoitems.PriceConv), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustItem), RVAR C(NOTCEdit), RVAR C(NOTCDescriptionEdit), RVAR C(DelTermsEdit), RVAR C(DelTermsDescription), RVAR C(ProcessIndEdit), RVAR C(ECCodeEdit), RVAR C(OriginEdit), RVAR C(CommodityEdit), RVAR C(SupplUnitsEdit), RVAR C(SSDValueEdit), RVAR C(Drop
Variable.Value2: ShipEdit), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustNum), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustSeq), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Whse), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Pricecode), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CoOrigSite), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Reprice), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Consolidate), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Summarize),)

Variable.Value2: items.CustNum), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustSeq), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Whse), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Pricecode), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CoOrigSite), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Reprice), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Consolidate), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Summarize),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdObjectNewCompleted0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR C(CoNumEdit), VAR P(CoLine), RVAR C(ShipSiteEdit), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Stat), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Item), RVAR P(SLCoitems.UM), RVAR C(QtyOrderedEdit), RVAR C(DueDateEdit), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Price), RVAR P(SLCoitems.PriceConv), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustItem), RVAR C(NOTCEdit), RVAR C(NOTCDescriptionEdit), RVAR C(DelTermsEdit), RVAR C(DelTermsDescription), RVAR C(ProcessIndEdit), RVAR C(ECCodeEdit), RVAR C(OriginEdit), RVAR C(CommodityEdit), RVAR C(SupplUnitsEdit), RVAR C(SSDValueEdit), RVAR C(Drop
Variable.Value2: ShipEdit), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustNum), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CustSeq), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Whse), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Pricecode), RVAR P(SLCoitems.CoOrigSite), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Reprice), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Consolidate), RVAR P(SLCoitems.Summarize),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdObjectNewCompleted2
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), RVAR V(CoCustNum), RVAR P(Adr0Name), RVAR P(CoOrderDate), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(Description), RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(CblBlanketQtyConv), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(CblContPriceConv), RVAR P(CblEffDate), RVAR P(CblExpDate), RVAR P(AdrCreditHold), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(TaxCode1), RVAR P(Tc1Description), RVAR P(TaxCode2), RVAR P(Tc2Description), RVAR P(AdrCurrCode), RVAR P(TransNat), VAR P(TransNat2), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origi
Variable.Value2: n), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(UnitWeight), RVAR V(Price), RVAR P(CurrencyAmtFormat), RVAR P(CurrencyCstPrcFormat), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR P(ComSupplQtyReq), RVAR P(SupplQtyConvFactor), MESSAGE, RVAR P(CostConv),)

Variable.Name: ehm1_StdObjectNewCompletedxx0
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), RVAR P(ShipSite), RVAR P(Stat), RVAR P(Item), RVAR P(UM), RVAR P(QtyOrderedConv), RVAR P(DueDate), RVAR, RVAR , RVAR P(CustItem), RVAR P(TransNat), RVAR P(TrnDescription), RVAR P(Delterm), RVAR P(DltDescription), RVAR P(ProcessInd), RVAR P(EcCode), RVAR P(Origin), RVAR P(CommCode), RVAR P(SupplQty), RVAR P(ExportValue), RVAR P(CoCustNum), RVAR, RVAR P(Whse), RVAR P(Pricecode), RVAR, RVAR, RVAR P(Consolidate), RVAR P(Summarize), RVAR P(InvFreq), RVAR P(RefType), RVAR, RVAR, RV

Variable.Name: ehm1_XrefCreate9
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR P(CoNum), VAR P(CoLine), VAR P(CoRelease), VAR P(RefType), VAR P(RefNum), VAR P(RefLineSuf), VAR P(RefRelease), VAR P(Item), VAR P(Description), VAR P(UM), VAR P(CoStat), VAR P(QtyOrderedConv), VAR P(DueDate), VAR V(ToWhse), VAR P(Whse), VAR V(FromSite), VAR V(ToSite), VAR V(PoChangeOrd), VAR V(MpwxrefDelete), VAR V(CreateFlag), VAR V(CreateFlag2), RVAR P(RefNum), RVAR P(RefLineSuf), RVAR P(RefRelease), VAR V(TrnLoc), VAR V(FOBSite), RVAR V(TrnLocQuestionAsked), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR

Variable.Name: ehm2_CallGetCoItemDetailForBlanketSp0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(DerNonInventoryItemFlag), RVAR P(NonInvAcct), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit1), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit2), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit3), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit4), RVAR P(ManufacturerId), RVAR P(ManufacturerItem), RVAR P(ManufacturerItemDescription), RVAR P(MfrName), RVAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: ehm2_GetCoitemDetails2
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(CostConv), RVAR P(DerNonInventoryItemFlag), RVAR P(NonInvAcct), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit1), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit2), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit3), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit4), RVAR P(ManufacturerId), RVAR P(ManufacturerItem), RVAR P(ManufacturerItemDescription), RVAR P(MfrName), RVAR P(DerLinePlant))

Variable.Name: ehm2_StdFormNewCompleted0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR RCoitemTaxCode1Desc, RVAR RCoitemTaxCode2, RVAR RCoitemTaxCode2Desc, MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm2_StdFormNewCompleted1
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(SLCoitems.InvFreq), RVAR P(SLCoitems.FeatStr), RVAR P(SLCoitems.ReleaseDate), RVAR P(SLCoitems.RefType), RVAR C(TaxCode1Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode1DescriptionEdit), RVAR C(TaxCode2Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode2DescriptionEdit), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm2_StdFormNewCompleted2
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(SLCoitems.InvFreq), RVAR P(SLCoitems.FeatStr), RVAR P(SLCoitems.ReleaseDate), RVAR P(SLCoitems.RefType), RVAR C(TaxCode1Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode1DescriptionEdit), RVAR C(TaxCode2Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode2DescriptionEdit), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm2_StdObjectNewCompleted0
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(SLCoitems.InvFreq), RVAR P(SLCoitems.FeatStr), RVAR P(SLCoitems.ReleaseDate), RVAR P(SLCoitems.RefType), RVAR C(TaxCode1Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode1DescriptionEdit), RVAR C(TaxCode2Edit), RVAR C(TaxCode2DescriptionEdit), MESSAGE)

Variable.Name: ehm2_StdObjectNewCompleted2
Variable.Value: PARMS2( RVAR P(DerNonInventoryItemFlag), RVAR P(NonInvAcct), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit1), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit2), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit3), RVAR P(NonInvAcctUnit4), RVAR P(ManufacturerId), RVAR P(ManufacturerItem), RVAR P(ManufacturerItemDescription), RVAR P(MfrName))

Variable.Name: fds_DataSource
Variable.Value: SL.SLCoitems( FILTERPERM(CoType = 'B') ORDERBY(CoNum DESC, CoLine, CoRelease) INS(DefineVariableSp('AllowOverCreditLimit',DerAllowOverCreditLimit,MESSAGE),LockCoSp(CoNum,1),DefineVariableSp('PlanOnSave',UbPlanOnSave,MESSAGE),STD,UnDefineVariableSp('PlanOnSave',MESSAGE),REF) UPD(DefineVariableSp('AllowOverCreditLimit',DerAllowOverCreditLimit,MESSAGE),LockCoSp(CoNum,1),STD,REF) DEL(ValidatorRefPickListSp(CoNum,CoLine,CoRelease,MESSAGE),STD,REF) RLACS() LOCKMODE(Row) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( RS_QCInspDisps( CA(RNCSDVIOG) FILTERPERM(RefNum = FP(CoNum) AND Item = FP(Item) AND RefLine = FP(CoLine)) ORDERBY(RcvrNum DESC) LOCKMODE(Row) ) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: lUnfilled = lIsNew Or (InStr(1, "FCH", ThisForm.Components("StatusEdit").Text) = 0 And InStr(1, "FCH", ThisForm.Components("DerOldStatEdit").Text) = 0)
lIncomplete = lIsNew Or (InStr(1, "CH", ThisForm.Components("StatusEdit").Text) = 0 And InStr(1, "CH", ThisForm.Components("DerOldStatEdit").Text) = 0)
If Not lCanChangeItem And ThisForm.Components("StatusEdit").Text = "O" And IsNumeric(ThisForm.Components("QtyOrderedEdit")) Then
ThisForm.Components("WhseEdit").Enabled = lIncomplete And lOnShipSite And lCanUpdate And lCanChangeItem
ThisForm.Components("NOTCEdit").Enabled = lOnOrigSite And lIncomplete And lEcReporting
ThisForm.Components("ECCodeEdit").Enabled = lOnOrigSite And lIncomplete And lEcReporting
ThisForm.Components("OriginEdit").Enabled = lOnOrigSite And lIncomplete And lEcReporting
ThisForm.Components("WhseGridCol").Enabled = lIncomplete And lOnShipSite And lCanUpdate And lCanChangeItem
ThisForm.Components("TaxCode1Edit").Enabled = lIncomplete And lCanUpdate And lOnOrigSite And lPromptOnLine1
ThisForm.Components("TaxCode2Edit").Enabled = lIncomplete And lCanUpdate And lOnOrigSite And lPromptOnLine2
ThisForm.Components("TaxCode1GridCol").Enabled = lIncomplete And lCanUpdate And lOnOrigSite And lPromptOnLine1
ThisForm.Components("TaxCode2GridCol").Enabled = lIncomplete And lCanUpdate And lOnOrigSite And lPromptOnLine2
If lUnfilled And lCanUpdate And lOnOrigSite And bExtShipDoc Then
lMode5 = (lCanUpdate Or lIsNew) And lIncomplete And lUnfilled
If Not bCreateFlag And strXrefDestination <> "" Then
ThisForm.Variables("XrefForm").Value = "JobOrders( FILTER(Job='P(RefNum)' and Suffix='P(RefLineSuf)') OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )"
ThisForm.Variables("XrefForm").Value = "PurchaseOrderLines( FILTER(PoNum ='P(RefNum)' and PoLine='P(RefLineSuf)') OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )"
ThisForm.Variables("XrefForm").Value = "PurchaseOrderRequisitionLines( FILTER(ReqNum='P(RefNum)' and ReqLine='P(RefLineSuf)') OKCANCELOPTIONAL() SETVARVALUES(InitialCommand=Refresh) )"
'This should only happen on a new record when user has changed value and there
If ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew() And ThisForm.ParentForm Is Nothing Then
'if the user hit cancel on the modal form,
' clean up NextKeys table for failed X-Ref
' clean up RefNum display, when modal has cancled
If (bNonInventoryItem Or (Not bNonInventoryItem And Not bPostJour)) And bUnfilled And bIncomplete Then
If dQtyRsvd <> 0 And dQtyRsvd <> dQtyOrderedConv Then
If Not oApsParmAll Is Nothing And oApsParmAll.Items.Count > 0 Then
Application.ShowMessage("There are still pending changes. Select the unsaved record and save it again.")
If oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectModified() = True Or oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew() = True Then
If oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectModified() = True Or oCOLineCollection.IsCurrentObjectNew() = True Then
If (priceConv <> stdPrice) And NOT bDerNonInventoryItemFlag And bOrigSite Then
